categories.title: Audio Recordings
categories.summary: Raw interview audio from our field research sessions.
categories.description: Original voice recordings captured during empathy interviews. Each clip is paired with a transcript under the Transcripts section.

blocks.heading: Overview
paragraphs: This archive contains the original audio captured during our user interviews. Recordings are uploaded as the team gathers them.
To add a new recording: drop the file into assets/audio/ in the repo and append a new entry under the audio block below.

categories.title: Consolidated Personas
categories.summary: Merged personas synthesized from across our user research.
categories.description: After interviewing across user segments, we consolidated overlapping traits into a small set of representative personas.

blocks.heading: Synthesis approach
paragraphs: Individual personas were grouped by shared goals, frustrations, and behaviors. Each consolidated persona represents a recurring archetype from our interview data.

categories.title: HMW Question
categories.summary: Our refined How Might We question and how we arrived at it.
categories.description: The How Might We question that anchors our project and the reasoning behind its framing.

blocks.heading: Our HMW
paragraphs: How might we [insert your final HMW question here] — phrased to be broad enough to invite ideation but narrow enough to anchor a solution.

blocks.heading: Why this framing
paragraphs: We tested multiple framings against our consolidated personas. This one consistently surfaced the highest-quality ideas during our brainstorming sessions.

categories.title: Journey Map
categories.summary: The end-to-end experience of our primary persona.
categories.description: A visualization of touchpoints, emotions, and friction points across the user journey.

items.caption: End-to-end journey for our primary persona

categories.title: Personas
categories.summary: Individual personas captured from raw interview data.
categories.description: Each persona represents one interviewee's goals, frustrations, and context, before consolidation.

categories.title: RCA
categories.summary: Root cause analysis behind the problem we chose.
categories.description: A structured breakdown of the underlying causes that produce the symptoms our users report.

blocks.heading: Method
paragraphs: We used the 5-Whys technique combined with a fishbone diagram to trace surface-level complaints back to systemic root causes.

categories.title: Responses and Graph (HMW)
categories.summary: Quantitative responses to our HMW survey, visualized.
categories.description: Raw response counts and visualizations from the survey we ran to validate the HMW question.

categories.title: Solution
categories.description: The concept, the prototype, and the reasoning that brought us here.

blocks.heading: The concept
paragraphs: Describe your solution here — what it is, who it's for, and the core insight that makes it work.

categories.title: Transcripts
categories.description: Verbatim transcripts of every recording in the Audio Recordings archive.
